Out with the old, and in with the new.\\: Out with the old, and in with the new.\nAs they say.

I've been out of Aevium for far too long: I've been out of Aevium for far too long.
My favorite place in the entire region i: My favorite place in the entire region is Route 9. So beautiful and fall-like.

MOM: Truthfully, I'm not sure.\\nI think: MOM: Truthfully, I'm not sure.\nI think that's unlikely...
Crescent lacked the ability to do such a: Crescent lacked the ability to do such a thing, and although Anastasia could...
I did not find any such evidence of that: I did not find any such evidence of that within myself.
I had no inherent intuition to protect y: I had no inherent intuition to protect you.
At first I didn't know what to do with y: At first I didn't know what to do with you.
But then I saw how sad your face was.\\n: But then I saw how sad your face was.\nYou had no idea what to do in this world.
I decided from then on that I would do m: I decided from then on that I would do my best to protect you.
I have nothing to regret. I suppose if a: I have nothing to regret. I suppose if anything, I regret not being stronger.
Crescent handed me my Sylveon that was i: Crescent handed me my Sylveon that was inside of a Ball manufactured by Team Xen.
I suppose that had to belong to the real: I suppose that had to belong to the real Nancy.
MOM: I did some digging into who she was: MOM: I did some digging into who she was, by the way.
The visuals you see when you look upon m: The visuals you see when you look upon me... It's how she looked during her time as your teacher.
The outfit you are familiar with is what: The outfit you are familiar with is what she looked like more towards the end of her life.\|
MOM: Haha... No, she wasn't.\\nShe has n: MOM: Haha... No, she wasn't.\nShe has no relation to any of her classmates.
She, like most in Aevium, was from Miera: She, like most in Aevium, was from Miera before it shut down.
She was a social worker, that much is tr: She was a social worker, that much is true.
But in her younger years I've discovered: But in her younger years I've discovered that she was a detective, and eventually an affiliate of the International Police.
She was on a case involving a crime synd: She was on a case involving a crime syndicate and a nuclear reactor.
With her partner Sylveon, and a friend,: With her partner Sylveon, and a friend, she was able to corner the culprit.
She lost that friend and another child t: She lost that friend and another child to an explosion.
Her sacrifice allowed Nancy to live, and: Her sacrifice allowed Nancy to live, and to eventually find asylum in Aevium.
It seems Miera's connection to Aevium ca: It seems Miera's connection to Aevium cannot be overstated...
MOM: \\PN, we could probably hide in thi: MOM: \PN, we could probably hide in this world for a long time.
I can slow Zeight's processing.\\nPerhap: I can slow Zeight's processing.\nPerhaps you could live a full life here.
In order to do so, I will have to give a: In order to do so, I will have to give all that I am. I will be undone.
But even with that, you cannot run away: But even with that, you cannot run away from inevitability.
And the S.S. Oceana will sink once more.
Whatever you decide is up to you.
But before you do, I have something I ne: But before you do, I have something I need to share with you.
\\c[6]The final entry of the Karma Files: \c[6]The final entry of the Karma Files.

I wondered why that was the case.
And I've come to the conclusion that it: And I've come to the conclusion that it was never meant to be part of the collection of Karma files.
Someone saw that important information w: Someone saw that important information was being leaked.
And decided to slip in something extra d: And decided to slip in something extra during that process.
That person... well, it can only be one.
She sent you this file, personally.

Either choice is valid. It's just up to: Either choice is valid. It's just up to you.
